EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void mirror_cleanup (void )

Definition at line 96 of file mirror.c.

96                           {
97   if (g_digital_rain) {
98     digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
99     g_digital_rain = NULL;
100   }
101   if (g_last_rain_output) {
102     SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
103     g_last_rain_output = NULL;
104   }
105   options_state_destroy();
106   platform_destroy();
107 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * mirror_convert_frame (uint8_t * rgba_data, int src_width, int
  src_height)


Definition at line 114 of file mirror.c.


114                                                                               {
115   if (!rgba_data || src_width <= 0 || src_height <= 0) {
116     return NULL;
117   }
118 
119   // Get current settings from options or terminal detection
120   int dst_width = (int)terminal_get_effective_width();
121   int dst_height = (int)terminal_get_effective_height();
122   color_filter_t filter = (color_filter_t)GET_OPTION(color_filter);
123   terminal_color_mode_t color_mode = (terminal_color_mode_t)GET_OPTION(color_mode);
124   palette_type_t palette_type = (palette_type_t)GET_OPTION(palette_type);
125   bool aspect_ratio = true; // Preserve webcam aspect ratio
126   bool stretch = false;     // Don't stretch - maintain proportions
127 
128   // Build terminal capabilities structure with user's color mode
129   terminal_capabilities_t caps = {0}; // Zero-initialize all fields first
130   caps.color_level = color_mode;
131   caps.capabilities = 0;
132   caps.color_count = (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_NONE)  ? 0
133                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_16)  ? 16
134                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_256) ? 256
135                                                       : 16777216;
136   caps.utf8_support = true;
137   caps.detection_reliable = true;
138   caps.render_mode = (render_mode_t)GET_OPTION(render_mode);
139   caps.wants_background = false;
140   caps.wants_padding = true; // Enable padding for centering in mirror mode
141   caps.palette_type = palette_type;
142   caps.desired_fps = 60;
143   caps.color_filter = filter;
144 
145   // Convert RGBA to RGB (strip alpha channel) and optionally flip horizontally
146   rgb_pixel_t *rgb_pixels = SAFE_MALLOC(src_width * src_height * sizeof(rgb_pixel_t), rgb_pixel_t *);
147   if (!rgb_pixels) {
148     return NULL;
149   }
150 
151   bool flip = GET_OPTION(flip_x);
152   for (int y = 0; y < src_height; y++) {
153     for (int x = 0; x < src_width; x++) {
154       int src_x = flip ? (src_width - 1 - x) : x;
155       int src_idx = (y * src_width + src_x) * 4;
156       int dst_idx = y * src_width + x;
157 
158       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].r = rgba_data[src_idx + 0];
159       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].g = rgba_data[src_idx + 1];
160       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].b = rgba_data[src_idx + 2];
161       // Alpha (rgba_data[src_idx + 3]) is discarded
162     }
163   }
164 
165   // Apply color filter to pixels if needed (except rainbow - handled in ANSI stage)
166   if (filter != COLOR_FILTER_NONE && filter != COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
167     // color_filter operates on packed RGB24 format
168     uint8_t *rgb24 = (uint8_t *)rgb_pixels;
169     int stride = src_width * 3;
170     float time_seconds = (float)(emscripten_get_now() / 1000.0); // Convert ms to seconds
171     apply_color_filter(rgb24, src_width, src_height, stride, filter, time_seconds);
172   }
173 
174   // Create image structure
175   image_t img = {.w = src_width, .h = src_height, .pixels = rgb_pixels, .alloc_method = IMAGE_ALLOC_SIMD};
176 
177   // Get palette characters based on selected palette type
178   const char *palette_chars;
179   switch (palette_type) {
180   case PALETTE_BLOCKS:
181     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_BLOCKS;
182     break;
183   case PALETTE_DIGITAL:
184     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_DIGITAL;
185     break;
186   case PALETTE_MINIMAL:
187     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_MINIMAL;
188     break;
189   case PALETTE_COOL:
190     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_COOL;
191     break;
192   case PALETTE_CUSTOM:
193     // Custom palette uses user-provided characters from options
194     palette_chars = GET_OPTION(palette_custom);
195     if (!palette_chars || palette_chars[0] == '\0') {
196       palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD; // Fallback
197     }
198     break;
199   case PALETTE_STANDARD:
200   default:
201     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD;
202     break;
203   }
204 
205   // Convert to ASCII using capability-aware function
206   char *ascii_output =
207       ascii_convert_with_capabilities(&img, dst_width, dst_height, &caps, aspect_ratio, stretch, palette_chars);
208 
209   // Clean up
210   SAFE_FREE(rgb_pixels);
211 
212   if (!ascii_output) {
213     log_error("ascii_convert_with_capabilities returned NULL");
214     return NULL;
215   }
216 
217   // Apply rainbow color filter to ANSI output by replacing RGB values
218   // This preserves character selection while applying rainbow colors
219   if (filter == COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
220     float time_seconds = (float)(emscripten_get_now() / 1000.0); // Convert ms to seconds
221     char *rainbow_output = rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(ascii_output, time_seconds);
222     if (rainbow_output) {
223       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
224       ascii_output = rainbow_output;
225     }
226   }
227 
228   // Apply digital rain effect if enabled
229   bool matrix_rain = GET_OPTION(matrix_rain);
230   if (matrix_rain) {
231     // Initialize digital rain context if needed or dimensions changed
232     if (!g_digital_rain || g_digital_rain->num_columns != dst_width || g_digital_rain->num_rows != dst_height) {
233       if (g_digital_rain) {
234         digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
235       }
236       if (g_last_rain_output) {
237         SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
238         g_last_rain_output = NULL;
239       }
240       g_digital_rain = digital_rain_init(dst_width, dst_height);
241       if (!g_digital_rain) {
242         log_error("Failed to initialize digital rain effect");
243         return ascii_output; // Return without effect on error
244       }
245       g_last_rain_update_time = emscripten_get_now();
246     }
247 
248     // Update color from active filter (allows filter changes after initialization)
249     digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(g_digital_rain, filter);
250 
251     // Time-based updates: only update effect every RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS
252     double current_time = emscripten_get_now();
253     double elapsed_ms = current_time - g_last_rain_update_time;
254 
255     if (elapsed_ms >= RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS) {
256       // Calculate actual delta time in seconds
257       float delta_time = (float)(elapsed_ms / 1000.0);
258       g_last_rain_update_time = current_time;
259 
260       // Apply effect and cache a copy
261       char *rain_output = digital_rain_apply(g_digital_rain, ascii_output, delta_time);
262       if (rain_output) {
263         // Free old cached output
264         if (g_last_rain_output) {
265           SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
266         }
267         // Cache a copy (we'll return the original rain_output)
268         g_last_rain_output = strdup(rain_output);
269         // Return the rain output (caller will free it)
270         SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
271         ascii_output = rain_output;
272       }
273     } else if (g_last_rain_output) {
274       // Use cached output
275       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
276       ascii_output = strdup(g_last_rain_output);
277     }
278   } else {
279     // Clean up digital rain context if it exists but effect is disabled
280     if (g_digital_rain) {
281       digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
282       g_digital_rain = NULL;
283     }
284     if (g_last_rain_output) {
285       SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
286       g_last_rain_output = NULL;
287     }
288     g_last_rain_update_time = 0.0;
289   }
290 
291   return ascii_output;
292 }






References apply_color_filter(),
    ascii_convert_with_capabilities(), aspect_ratio(),
    digital_rain_apply(), digital_rain_destroy(),
    digital_rain_init(), digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(),
    RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS, rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(),
    terminal_get_effective_height(), and
    terminal_get_effective_width().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void mirror_free_string (char * ptr)


Definition at line 295 of file mirror.c.


295                                    {
296   SAFE_FREE(ptr);
297 }










EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int mirror_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize mirror mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json JSON array of argument strings, e.g.
  ["mirror", "--width", "80",
  "--height", "40"]


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 44 of file mirror.c.


44                                                  {
45   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: START");
46   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: After START log");
47 
48   // Initialize platform layer
49   WASM_LOG("Calling platform_init...");
50   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: About to call platform_init");
51   asciichat_error_t err = platform_init();
52   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: platform_init returned");
53   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
54     WASM_ERROR("platform_init FAILED");
55     return -1;
56   }
57   WASM_LOG("platform_init OK");
58 
59   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
60   WASM_LOG("Calling log_init...");
61   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEBUG, true, false);
62   WASM_LOG("log_init OK");
63 
64   // Parse space-separated arguments
65   WASM_LOG("Parsing arguments...");
66   char *args_copy = NULL;
67   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
68   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
69   if (argc < 0) {
70     WASM_ERROR("strdup FAILED");
71     return -1;
72   }
73   WASM_LOG_INT("Parsed arguments, argc", argc);
74 
75   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
76   WASM_LOG("Calling options_init...");
77   err = options_init(argc, argv);
78   free(args_copy);
79 
80   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
81     WASM_LOG_INT("options_init FAILED", err);
82     return -1;
83   }
84   WASM_LOG("options_init OK");
85 
86   // Initialize ANSI color code generation (dec3 cache for RGB values)
87   WASM_LOG("Calling ansi_fast_init...");
88   ansi_fast_init();
89   WASM_LOG("ansi_fast_init OK");
90 
91   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: COMPLETE");
92   return 0;
93 }






References ansi_fast_init(), log_init(),
    options_init(), platform_init(), WASM_ERROR,
    WASM_LOG, WASM_LOG_INT, and wasm_parse_args().
